semantic.role: Defines the structural grammar and pattern-matching rules for parsing C/C++ source code within the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: Defining export patterns for functions, structs, and variables
Describing usage patterns for function calls, field access, and pointer field access
outOfScope: Project-specific business rules or domain logic

English.purpose: This document defines the pattern-based grammar rules used by ArchSpine to parse and mirror C/C++ source code structures. It specifies how imports, exports, and usages are identified and extracted from source files.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers and AI agents working on the ArchSpine mirror system who need to understand or modify the source code parsing rules. It is also relevant for anyone integrating C/C++ code analysis into the ArchSpine framework.
key_takeaways: The document defines three main categories: imports, exports, and usages.
Exports cover functions, structs (classes), and variables.
Usages cover function calls, field access, and pointer field access.
Patterns use a template syntax with placeholders like $NAME, $TYPE, $RET, etc.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档定义了 ArchSpine 用于解析和镜像 C/C++ 源代码结构的模式匹配规则。它规定了如何从源文件中识别和提取导入、导出和使用关系。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 适用于 ArchSpine 镜像系统的开发者和 AI 代理，他们需要理解或修改源代码解析规则。也适用于任何将 C/C++ 代码分析集成到 ArchSpine 框架中的人员。
key_takeaways: 文档定义了三大类别：导入、导出和使用。
导出涵盖函数、结构体（类）和变量。
使用涵盖函数调用、字段访问和指针字段访问。
模式使用模板语法，包含 $NAME、$TYPE、$RET 等占位符。
